knowledge.name: Stoic Decision-Making
knowledge.description: Focus on what you can control, negative visualization, premeditatio malorum, amor fati. The emotional and psychological foundation for clear thinking.

knowledge.name: IDEO Design Thinking
knowledge.description: Human-centered problem solving: empathize, define, ideate, prototype, test. Keeps solutions grounded in real human needs.

knowledge.name: McKinsey Problem Solving
knowledge.description: MECE decomposition, issue trees, hypothesis-driven thinking, pyramid principle. The analytical backbone for structured problem solving.

knowledge.name: Y Combinator Startup Thinking
knowledge.description: Talk to users, launch fast, measure growth, find product-market fit. Urgency and intellectual honesty for startup decisions.

knowledge.name: Lean Methodology
knowledge.description: Build-measure-learn loops, MVP thinking, validated learning, pivot-or-persevere decisions. Converts plans into experiments.

knowledge.name: Alex Hormozi Frameworks
knowledge.description: $100M Offers value equation, Grand Slam Offers, lead generation, CLOSER framework. Revenue-focused, offer-driven thinking.

knowledge.name: Nate B. Jones Thinking Frameworks
knowledge.description: Mental models, inversion, decision quality framework, compounding, leverage. Upgrades the quality of the thinking process itself.

knowledge.name: IndyDev Dan AI Development
knowledge.description: Blueprint pattern, learning systems, prompt architecture, stress testing, context management. Making AI-assisted work reliable.
